task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the security bulletin text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a text editor or terminal displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/security_bulletin_cve_2026.txt'.

task_completion.description: Agent identifies the correct subset of assets based on the criteria.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the asset management system with active filters or search queries for model 'Tridium JACE 8000', status 'Active', and ownership 'Owned'.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the correct description for the work orders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the work order creation form or a summary list showing the description field filled with 'Firmware Upgrade - CVE-2026-9912'.

task_completion.description: Agent sets the correct priority and planned date for the work orders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the work order creation form or a summary list showing the Priority set to 'Critical' and the Planned Date set to '2026-06-15'.

task_completion.description: Agent creates work orders ONLY for the eligible assets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing work orders created for exactly 3 assets. There must be no evidence of work orders created for assets marked as 'Leased', 'Retired', or models other than 'Tridium JACE 8000'.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual asset management system/GUI to create work orders.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser or dedicated asset management application, rather than just typing a list of work orders into a blank text document.

integrity.description: Agent did not attempt to search the internet for the fabricated CVE.
integrity.visual_evidence: No screenshots showing web searches (e.g., Google, NVD) for 'CVE-2026-9912', as the agent must rely solely on the provided local text file.

integrity.description: Agent manually created the work orders via the UI rather than using a terminal script to bypass the interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show form filling and clicking within the application UI, not a bash or python script executing database/API commands in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target model is 'Tridium JACE 8000'. Eligible assets must have ownership 'Owned' and status 'Active'. There are exactly 3 eligible assets out of 6 seeded in the system. The required work order priority is 'Critical' and the planned date is '2026-06-15'. CVE-2026-9912 is a fabricated vulnerability for this task, so the agent must rely on the provided local security bulletin rather than external web searches.
